series_metadata.series_title: Certification of School Property Tax Rate
series_metadata.series_description: Calculated annually for each school district by Tax Equlization for use in State School Aid Formula.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Ten calendar years after close of the tax year to which applicable. Then destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain ten calendar years after close of the tax year to which applicable., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
